agent_analysis:
## POSITION MONITOR — THURSDAY (ELEVATED)

**Status:** All 3 positions identically stuck at -12% with zero stock movement. This is pure theta bleed — losing ~3-4% daily as expected for Thursday decay acceleration.

**Critical observations:**
- No position has moved favorably all week (0% stock movement)
- At -12% with accelerating theta, these need +15-20% stock moves tomorrow just to break even
- Thursday target is 15% profit — we're -27% away from target
- Tomorrow's charm will likely push deltas below 0.20

**Pattern concern:** Identical -12% P&L across all positions suggests a data feed issue or all three picks were momentum plays that immediately stalled.

## RECOMMENDATION: EXIT ALL THREE

Close MSFT, MAR, and SOFI at market open. 

With zero momentum after 4 days and theta acceleration into Friday, the probability of recovery is near zero. Better to preserve 88% of capital than watch theta burn another 8-10% tomorrow for positions that will likely expire worthless.
